caption: A man with a tall, silver-white pompadour hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. He wears a white button-down shirt with a bow tie and tan suspenders, along with black over-ear headphones. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks. On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners: on the left, a logo with a microphone icon reads "THE STUDIO PODCAST," and on the right, red text reads "GOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static position, slightly shifting his facial expression and mouth as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
